Install Dependencies
(fallback for SessionStart)
pyyaml >= 6.0
mlflow[genai] >= 3.5
anthropic[vertex] >= 0.40

MLflow Tracking
(skip if --skip-mlflow)
--tracking-uri flag
or ask user:
1. Local server (:5000)
2. SQLite file store
3. Remote (Databricks)

Create MLflow Experiment
(skip if --skip-mlflow)
read mlflow.experiment
from eval.yaml
setup_experiment()
resolve tracking URI

check_env.py (no --fix)

div.div:
check_env.py
[+] python 3.11+
[+] mlflow >= 3.5
[+] pyyaml >= 6.0
[+] agent_eval symlink
[+] anthropic (optional)
[+] api_keys set
[+] mlflow_server reachable
[+] directories present
[+] eval_config valid
